con:part.con:content: <wsdl:definitions name="VolumeService" targetNamespace="http://tempuri.org/" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soapenc="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/" xmlns:wsu="http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-utility-1.0.xsd" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:soap12="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap12/" xmlns:tns="http://tempuri.org/" xmlns:wsa="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/08/addressing" xmlns:wsx="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/mex" xmlns:wsap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/08/addressing/policy" xmlns:wsaw="http://www.w3.org/2006/05/addressing/wsdl" xmlns:msc="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ws/2005/12/wsdl/contract" xmlns:wsp="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/policy" xmlns:wsa10="http://www.w3.org/2005/08/addressing" xmlns:wsam="http://www.w3.org/2007/05/addressing/metadata"> <wsdl:types> <xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://tempuri.org/Imports"> <xsd:import schemaLocation="http://sdb.dtu.dk/VolumeService/VolumeService.svc?xsd=xsd0" namespace="http://tempuri.org/"/> <xsd:import schemaLocation="http://sdb.dtu.dk/VolumeService/VolumeService.svc?xsd=xsd1" namespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/"/> <xsd:import schemaLocation="http://sdb.dtu.dk/VolumeService/VolumeService.svc?xsd=xsd2" namespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/VolumeService"/> </xsd:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="IVolumeService_GetVolumes_InputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetVolumes"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IVolumeService_GetVolumes_OutputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetVolumesResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IVolumeService_GetEducationsInVolume_InputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetEducationsInVolume"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IVolumeService_GetEducationsInVolume_OutputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetEducationsInVolumeResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IVolumeService_GetEducationsInVolumeDraft_InputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetEducationsInVolumeDraft"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IVolumeService_GetEducationsInVolumeDraft_OutputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetEducationsInVolumeDraftResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IVolumeService_GetGeneralViewsInVolume_InputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetGeneralViewsInVolume"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IVolumeService_GetGeneralViewsInVolume_OutputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetGeneralViewsInVolumeResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:portType name="IVolumeService"> <wsdl:operation name="GetVolumes"> <wsdl:input wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IVolumeService/GetVolumes" message="tns:IVolumeService_GetVolumes_InputMessage"/> <wsdl:output wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IVolumeService/GetVolumesResponse" message="tns:IVolumeService_GetVolumes_OutputMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetEducationsInVolume"> <wsdl:input wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IVolumeService/GetEducationsInVolume" message="tns:IVolumeService_GetEducationsInVolume_InputMessage"/> <wsdl:output wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IVolumeService/GetEducationsInVolumeResponse" message="tns:IVolumeService_GetEducationsInVolume_OutputMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetEducationsInVolumeDraft"> <wsdl:input wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IVolumeService/GetEducationsInVolumeDraft" message="tns:IVolumeService_GetEducationsInVolumeDraft_InputMessage"/> <wsdl:output wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IVolumeService/GetEducationsInVolumeDraftResponse" message="tns:IVolumeService_GetEducationsInVolumeDraft_OutputMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetGeneralViewsInVolume"> <wsdl:input wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IVolumeService/GetGeneralViewsInVolume" message="tns:IVolumeService_GetGeneralViewsInVolume_InputMessage"/> <wsdl:output wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IVolumeService/GetGeneralViewsInVolumeResponse" message="tns:IVolumeService_GetGeneralViewsInVolume_OutputMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <wsdl:binding name="BasicHttpBinding_IVolumeService" type="tns:IVolumeService"> <soap:binding transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <wsdl:operation name="GetVolumes"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://tempuri.org/IVolumeService/GetVolumes" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetEducationsInVolume"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://tempuri.org/IVolumeService/GetEducationsInVolume" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetEducationsInVolumeDraft"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://tempuri.org/IVolumeService/GetEducationsInVolumeDraft" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetGeneralViewsInVolume"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://tempuri.org/IVolumeService/GetGeneralViewsInVolume" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:service name="VolumeService"> <wsdl:port name="BasicHttpBinding_IVolumeService" binding="tns:BasicHttpBinding_IVolumeService"> <soap:address location="https://sdb.dtu.dk/VolumeService/VolumeService.svc"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </wsdl:definitions>

<xs:schema elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://tempuri.org/" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:tns="http://tempuri.org/"> <xs:import schemaLocation="http://sdb.dtu.dk/VolumeService/VolumeService.svc?xsd=xsd2" namespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/VolumeService"/> <xs:element name="GetVolumes"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence/> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetVolumesResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="GetVolumesResult" nillable="true" type="q1:ArrayOfVolume" xmlns:q1="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/VolumeService"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetEducationsInVolume"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="volume" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetEducationsInVolumeResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="GetEducationsInVolumeResult" nillable="true" type="q2:ArrayOfEducation" xmlns:q2="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/VolumeService"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetEducationsInVolumeDraft"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="volume" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetEducationsInVolumeDraftResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="GetEducationsInVolumeDraftResult" nillable="true" type="q3:ArrayOfEducation" xmlns:q3="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/VolumeService"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetGeneralViewsInVolume"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="volume" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="GetGeneralViewsInVolumeResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="GetGeneralViewsInVolumeResult" nillable="true" type="q4:ArrayOfGeneralView" xmlns:q4="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/VolumeService"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:schema>

<xs:schema elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/VolumeService" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:tns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/VolumeService"> <xs:complexType name="ArrayOfVolume"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="Volume" nillable="true" type="tns:Volume"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ArrayOfVolume" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfVolume"/> <xs:complexType name="Volume"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Active" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Current" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Editable" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Year" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="Volume" nillable="true" type="tns:Volume"/> <xs:complexType name="ArrayOfEducation"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="Education" nillable="true" type="tns:Education"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ArrayOfEducation" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfEducation"/> <xs:complexType name="Education"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Id" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Lines" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfLine"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Name" nillable="true" type="tns:LanguageItem"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="Education" nillable="true" type="tns:Education"/> <xs:complexType name="ArrayOfLine"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="Line" nillable="true" type="tns:Line"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ArrayOfLine" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfLine"/> <xs:complexType name="Line"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Code" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="IsInDanish" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="IsInEnglish" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Name" nillable="true" type="tns:LanguageItem"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PopularTitle" nillable="true" type="tns:LanguageItem"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ShortTitle" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="Line" nillable="true" type="tns:Line"/> <xs:complexType name="LanguageItem"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Danish" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="English" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="LanguageItem" nillable="true" type="tns:LanguageItem"/> <xs:complexType name="ArrayOfGeneralView"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="GeneralView" nillable="true" type="tns:GeneralView"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ArrayOfGeneralView" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfGeneralView"/> <xs:complexType name="GeneralView"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Guid" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Name" nillable="true" type="tns:LanguageItem"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="GeneralView" nillable="true" type="tns:GeneralView"/> </xs:schema>

<xs:schema attributeFormDefault="qualified" elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:tns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/"> <xs:element name="anyType" nillable="true" type="xs:anyType"/> <xs:element name="anyURI" nillable="true" type="xs:anyURI"/> <xs:element name="base64Binary" nillable="true" type="xs:base64Binary"/> <xs:element name="boolean" nillable="true" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element name="byte" nillable="true" type="xs:byte"/> <xs:element name="dateTime" nillable="true" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element name="decimal" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element name="double" nillable="true" type="xs:double"/> <xs:element name="float" nillable="true" type="xs:float"/> <xs:element name="int" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element name="long" nillable="true" type="xs:long"/> <xs:element name="QName" nillable="true" type="xs:QName"/> <xs:element name="short" nillable="true" type="xs:short"/> <xs:element name="string" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="unsignedByte" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedByte"/> <xs:element name="unsignedInt" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedInt"/> <xs:element name="unsignedLong" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedLong"/> <xs:element name="unsignedShort" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedShort"/> <xs:element name="char" nillable="true" type="tns:char"/> <xs:simpleType name="char"> <xs:restriction base="xs:int"/> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="duration" nillable="true" type="tns:duration"/> <xs:simpleType name="duration"> <xs:restriction base="xs:duration"> <xs:pattern value="\-?P(\d*D)?(T(\d*H)?(\d*M)?(\d*(\.\d*)?S)?)?"/> <xs:minInclusive value="-P10675199DT2H48M5.4775808S"/> <xs:maxInclusive value="P10675199DT2H48M5.4775807S"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="guid" nillable="true" type="tns:guid"/> <xs:simpleType name="guid"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:pattern value="[\da-fA-F]{8}-[\da-fA-F]{4}-[\da-fA-F]{4}-[\da-fA-F]{4}-[\da-fA-F]{12}"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:attribute name="FactoryType" type="xs:QName"/> <xs:attribute name="Id" type="xs:ID"/> <xs:attribute name="Ref" type="xs:IDREF"/> </xs:schema>
